archetype_name: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Soft Utility POS)

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing & Large Touch Targets for Mobile POS
layout_and_spacing.grid_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.grid_rooms: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3 sm:gap-4

components.buttons: Large, full-width on mobile, text-lg font-semibold, rounded-xl. Use primary color for main actions, stark white with border for secondary.
components.cards: Neumorphic-lite: Flat white background, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadow unless hovered. Rounded-xl.
components.inputs: Height h-14, text-base (prevents iOS zoom), rounded-lg, border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary.
components.navigation: Bottom navigation bar for mobile (fixed, glassmorphism), Sidebar for desktop.
components.room_grid_item: Aspect-square or slightly tall. Massive room number typography. Color-coded background based on status with white text for high contrast. Needs tap interaction to open quick action drawer.
components.pos_cart: Sidebar on desktop, sliding bottom sheet or full-screen modal on mobile.
components.data_testid_rule: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button').

motion_and_interaction.loading: Use skeleton screens (animate-pulse) instead of spinners for data loading to reduce perceived wait time.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use bold or fill weights for readability on mobile.

image_urls.description: Elegant hotel reception area featuring glass bubbles and minimalist design.
Baked pastry on bowl. Use as placeholder for POS items if no image is uploaded.
Modern homestay exterior for the main dashboard header or owner reports.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI using .js files (NO TypeScript).
Ensure the app is configured as a PWA (manifest.json, service worker) for offline readiness.
Implement the Layout: Mobile users get a bottom tab navigation (Dashboard, Rooms, POS, Settings), desktop gets a left sidebar.
Build the Room Grid with 18 items. Map the exact colors provided in the guidelines to the room states. Click should open a quick-action Dialog/Drawer.
Build the Check-in form as a multi-step wizard or single scrollable page with large inputs. Include an input for KTP photo upload.
For the POS system, use a 2-column layout on desktop (Products left, Cart right) and a floating Cart button on mobile that opens a Drawer.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) have a `data-testid` attribute for testing.
Use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons, keeping them large (e.g., size={24} or {32} on mobile).
Prioritize performance and large touch targets (min h-14 for buttons and inputs).
Follow the color scheme strictly: Deep blue primary, white/off-white backgrounds, and specific status colors.
